summary: Both REQ-3 and REQ-4 appear to be implemented in the diff. The HeroSection.tsx file summary explicitly states: 'logo image replacing the duplicate brand text in the top area' (REQ-4) and 'hero title (Legend, X, Arena) now centered horizontally with items-center/text-center' (REQ-3). The diff content for HeroSection.tsx is truncated so full code verification is limited, but the file-summary evidence is consistent with both requirements being addressed.
